title: Bare Bones Fast Grass
description: A simple texturepack that slightly improves performance in the BareBones style
body:
ABOUT:
-----------------------------------------
A simple texturepack that makes grass and related blocks use the top texture on the sides for the Bare Bones Texturepack since normally it will look ugly and this pack fixes that.











![example_2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/defbccd88cdfc4de604c26921b3affb5df040370_0.webp)
